summary: Iteration 31 - Testing new features: Training Sessions venue/location fields, Team/Academy Group banner_url, Image upload, Player profile 'Πληροφορίες Ομάδας' removal. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - all new features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefixed items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from this session verified: 1) Training Sessions have venue/location/arrival_time/Google Maps fields in both single and bulk forms (VenueFields component), 2) Teams and Academy Groups have banner_url field with upload functionality, 3) Image upload endpoint returns {image_url: ...}, 4) Player profile view does NOT show 'Πληροφορίες Ομάδας' section. Backend APIs at /api/admin/training-sessions (single) and /api/admin/training-sessions/bulk work correctly with venue fields.

training_session_single_create.details: POST /api/admin/training-sessions with venue, location, location_url, arrival_time fields - all fields saved and returned correctly

training_session_bulk_create.details: POST /api/admin/training-sessions/bulk with venue fields - creates multiple sessions with venue data

training_sessions_list.details: GET /api/admin/training-sessions returns venue/location data in response

team_banner_url_create.details: POST /api/admin/teams with banner_url field - saved and returned correctly

team_banner_url_get.details: GET /api/teams returns banner_url field in team objects

academy_group_banner_url_create.details: POST /api/admin/academy-groups with banner_url field - saved and returned correctly

academy_group_banner_url_get.details: GET /api/academy-groups returns banner_url field in group objects

image_upload.details: POST /api/admin/upload-image returns {image_url: '/api/uploads/...'} and image is accessible

frontend_team_banner_form.details: Team create/edit form has 'BANNER ΟΜΑΔΑΣ' field with upload button (data-testid='team-banner-upload') and URL input (data-testid='team-banner-url')

frontend_academy_group_banner_form.details: Academy Group create/edit form has 'BANNER ΟΜΑΔΑΣ' field with upload button (data-testid='group-banner-upload') and URL input (data-testid='group-banner-url')

frontend_training_venue_fields.details: Training Sessions forms (single and bulk) have ΤΟΠΟΘΕΣΙΑ section with venue select, venue input, arrival time, location address, and Google Maps link fields

player_profile_no_team_info.details: Player profile view does NOT show 'Πληροφορίες Ομάδας' section - correctly removed

mocked_apis.twilio_sms: OTP returned in API response debug field for testing
